calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial. No appearance by defendant(s)
Department 514, Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant(s) OTHMAN ABDALLAH.
Declaration of Maria Marin pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC. and against Defendant Othman Abdallah as follows:
Principal $1,369.14
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $236.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,605.14
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
